tagline: Simulation-as-a-Service: pay-per-run drug trial modeling with on-chain proof anchoring on an Initia appchain.
description: TrialFlow lets researchers configure and run Monte Carlo drug trial simulations gated by an Initia wallet transaction. Each simulation result is SHA-256 hashed and anchored on-chain, creating a tamper-evident audit trail. The platform runs on a dedicated Initia appchain with InterwovenKit wallet integration and session-key auto-signing for frictionless repeat runs.
initia_features: InterwovenKit wallet connection and transaction handling
Session key auto-signing for repeat simulation runs
Appchain-ready configuration with custom chain descriptor support
